games.title: Emoji Blast
games.desc: Emoji Blast is a vibrant match-and-pop puzzle game filled with explosions, combos, and power-ups. Clear rows, launch rockets, and blast your way to victory before your moves run out!

games.title: Triple Pop
games.desc: TriplePop is a fun match-3 memory puzzle where you flip cards, find matching emoji triples, and level up through increasingly tricky grids. Watch your moves, keep your lives, and chase the perfect score! 🎮✨

games.title: Lava Climber 🔥
games.desc: Jump between platforms, avoid the rising lava, and climb as high as possible! Can you survive the heat and reach the top?

games.title: Flappy Fury 🐦
games.desc: Flap, dodge, and survive! Flappy Fury is a chaotic, fast-paced game that tests your reflexes and persistence. Beat your high score and prove you’re the ultimate flapper!

games.title: Should I Text Him 💌
games.desc: A quiz to see if you should text your ex — chaotic, hilarious, and eye-opening!

games.title: Work or Nah 🤒
games.desc: Quick, savage, and relatable – guess who’s working and who’s slacking 🤓💀
